steps.name: Phase 0a: Analyze Setup Decisions
steps.description: Analyze contracts and target functions to determine setup decisions
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-0a.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-0a agent using the Task tool. This phase will analyze the codebase and output decisions to magic/setup-decisions.json.

decision.NOTE: Decisions file created, continue to implementation
Decisions file not found, retry analysis

steps.name: Phase 0b: Implement Setup.sol
steps.description: Implement Setup.sol based on the decisions in magic/setup-decisions.json
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-0b.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-0b agent using the Task tool. This phase will implement Setup.sol based on the decisions file and validate compilation.

steps.name: Phase 1: Run Echidna
steps.description: Run Echidna to test the fuzzing setup

steps.name: Phase 1.5: Save Echidna Logs
steps.description: Save Echidna output logs to magic/ directory for later analysis
steps.prompt: mkdir -p magic/logs && (find . -name '*.txt' -path '*/echidna/*' -exec cp {} magic/logs/ \; 2>/dev/null || true) && echo 'Echidna logs saved (if any exist)'

steps.name: Echidna Output Check
steps.description: Check if echidna/ directory exists to verify Echidna ran successfully

decision.NOTE: Echidna ran successfully, jump to extract target functions
Echidna failed to create output directory, jump to fix step

steps.name: Fix Echidna Failure
steps.description: Auto linking libraries to fix Echidna failure issues

steps.name: Retry Echidna After Fix
steps.description: Loop back to run Echidna again to verify the fix worked

decision.NOTE: Fix was implemented, loop back to run Echidna again to verify
Fallback to run Echidna again regardless since fix was still implemented

steps.name: Phase 2: Extract Target Functions
steps.description: Extract all targeted functions from the fuzzing suite using the extract_target_functions.py script

steps.name: Phase 3: Order Prerequisite Functions
steps.description: Sort functions in testing-priority.json based on prerequisite count

steps.name: Phase 1 Agent: Setup Phase 1
steps.description: Execute setup-phase-1 agent for additional setup tasks
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-1 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 2 Agent: Setup Phase 2
steps.description: Execute setup-phase-2 agent for final setup tasks
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-2.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-2 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 3 Agent: Setup Phase 3
steps.description: Execute setup-phase-3 agent for final setup tasks
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-3.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-3 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Workflow Completion Summary
steps.description: Generate final summary of fuzzing setup completion
steps.prompt:
Create a file called FUZZING_SETUP_COMPLETE.md that summarizes:
1. Successfully completed all phases (Phase 0 through Phase 3)
2. List the key artifacts created (Setup.sol, magic/setup-notes.md, testing-priority.json, echidna output)
3. Confirm that forge build compiles successfully
4. Confirm that forge test runs without reverts
5. Provide next steps: user can now run fuzzing campaigns using Echidna or other fuzzing tools
